03],[314,542,1776530409317],[323,541,1776530409330],[330,541,1776530409344],[333,540,1776530409361],[335,540,1776530409377],[336,540,1776530409393],[337,541,1776530409416],[338,541,1776530409422],[339,542,1776530409443],[340,542,1776530409456],[341,542,1776530409469],[341,543,1776530409478],[342,543,1776530409487],[343,543,1776530409513],[343,544,1776530409518],[344,544,1776530409534],[344,543,1776530409544],[344,542,1776530409553],[343,541,1776530409578],[343,540,1776530409586],[343,539,1776530409593],[343,538,1776530409606],[343,537,1776530409621],[343,536,1776530409636],[342,534,1776530409651],[342,533,1776530409658],[342,532,1776530409668],[342,531,1776530409680],[342,530,1776530409699],[342,529,1776530409711],[342,529,1776530409723],[342,530,1776530409745],[342,531,1776530409768],[342,532,1776530409788],[341,532,1776530409837]],"mm-mp":18.352622061482823,"md":[[343,543,1776530409535]],"md-mp":4425.75,"mu":[[343,543,1776530409712]],"mu-mp":4450.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
